heading: Step 3: Configure a network configuration.
body:
A Confluent Network Configuration that supports VPC (Virtual Private Cloud) peering is required before you create a VPC (Virtual Private Cloud) peering connection.
If a network configuration doesn't yet exist in your account, then select AWS (Amazon Web Services) as your cloud provider and select a region from the
**Add Network Configuration** field in Confluent Cloud.

> **Note:** If a Confluent VPC (Virtual Private Cloud) Peering Network Configuration already exists in your account, then proceed to **Step 7**.
